_comment3: Single source of truth for all framework configuration.
_comment5: Read at runtime by ConfigReader.java via Jackson ObjectMapper.
_comment11: then falls back to 'activeEnv' value set here
_comment14: TODO-1 : Replace all baseUrl values with your application URLs
_comment15: TODO-2 : Replace all apiBaseUrl values with your API endpoints
_comment16: TODO-3 : Replace db connection strings, users, passwords
_comment17: TODO-4 : Add/remove environments to match your pipeline stages
_comment18: TODO-5 : Never commit real passwords - use env vars in CI instead
_comment19: TODO-6 : Add any project-specific keys at the bottom

dev._comment: TODO-1: Replace with your dev application URL
dev._comment2: TODO-2: Replace with your dev API base URL
dev._comment3: TODO-3: Replace with your dev database connection details

staging._comment: TODO-1: Replace with your staging application URL
staging._comment2: TODO-2: Replace with your staging API base URL
staging._comment3: TODO-3: Replace with your staging database connection details

prod._comment: TODO-1: Replace with your production application URL
prod._comment2: TODO-2: Replace with your production API base URL
prod._comment3: TODO-3: Never store real prod credentials here.
prod._comment5: ConfigReader will read DB_URL, DB_USER, DB_PASS
prod._comment6: from System.getenv() when values start with '$'

options._comment3: TODO-6: Add any Chrome/Firefox args your project needs

api._comment: Shared API settings used by RequestBuilder.java
api._comment2: TODO-6: Add your API auth token key name if needed

reporting._comment2: TODO-6: Change report title and name to match your project

retry._comment2: TODO-6: Set retryCount to 1 or 2 for flaky UI tests

testData._comment: Paths to test data files, relative to src/test/resources
